__instructions: Copy this file, rename it to your-project-name.json, and fill in the fields. Delete all __note keys before saving.
__id_note: Must exactly match the filename without .json. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
__status_note: One of: active | completed | planned | submitted

description.en: A paragraph describing the project's aims, methods, and expected outcomes.
description.tr: Projenin amaçlarını, yöntemlerini ve beklenen çıktılarını açıklayan bir paragraf.

funding.__agency_note: Name of the funding body. Leave empty string if unfunded.
funding.__grant_note: Grant or project number assigned by the funding body.
funding.__amount_note: Funded amount as a string. Leave empty string if confidential.

__collaborators_note: Array of collaborator objects. Use empty array [] if solo project.
__start_date_note: Project start date in YYYY-MM format.
__end_date_note: Project end date in YYYY-MM format. Leave empty string if still ongoing.
__outputs_note: Array of publication IDs (from /content/publications/) produced by this project. Use empty array [] if none yet.
__url_note: Public project website URL. Leave empty string if none.
__osf_note: OSF preregistration URL (e.g. https://osf.io/abc123). Leave empty string if none.
__image_note: Optional image for the project card. Place the file in /public/images/. Leave empty string if none.
__featured_note: Set to true to show this project on the homepage.
